note: Shipments come from UPS My Choice (Third Party), Pirate Ship, and Shopify fulfillments, de-duplicated by tracking number. Carrier is tagged per row. UPS statuses auto-refresh 4x/day via the UPS Track API; FedEx shows the label + a tracking link but live FedEx status requires a FedEx Developer API (not yet connected).
